classes: Average browsing session length in minutes
Average number of pages viewed per session
Average value per order in US dollars
Binary target: 1 = churned (inactive >365 days, or >180 days + satisfaction ≤2), 0 = active

Channel through which the customer first arrived (acquisition source)
Country of residence (15 countries across 4 regions)
Cumulative number of orders placed
Customer age in years (18–75)
Date of the customer's most recent purchase (YYYY-MM-DD)
Date the customer created their account (YYYY-MM-DD)
Days between last_purchase_date and 2024-12-31 (snapshot date)
Days between signup_date and last_purchase_date
Most frequently used payment method
Post-purchase satisfaction rating: 1 (very dissatisfied) – 5 (very satisfied)
Primary device used to browse/purchase (Mobile, Desktop, Tablet)
Product category with the most purchases
Proportion of orders that contained at least one returned item (0–1)
Proportion of orders where a discount code was applied (0–1)
Self-reported annual household income range (USD)
Self-reported gender identity
Tier based on total_spent: Bronze<$400, Silver<$1800, Gold<$5000, Platinum≥$5000
Total lifetime spend in US dollars
Unique customer identifier (CUST-00001 … CUST-01200)
Whether the customer opted into marketing emails
